title: Persistent Agent Coordination via SpacetimeDB
description: Replace inline agent function calls with persistent worker processes that coordinate through SpacetimeDB. Agents heartbeat, pick up tasks from a queue, and communicate via shared memory.

steps.description: Create hex agent worker --role <role> command — persistent process with task loop, heartbeat, and SpacetimeDB subscription
acceptance: hex agent worker --role hex-coder starts a persistent process
Process subscribes to swarm_task table filtered by role
Heartbeat sent every 30s via agent_heartbeat reducer
Process picks up tasks when status changes to assigned
Graceful shutdown on SIGTERM writes disconnect

steps.description: Add task dependency field to hexflo-coordination WASM module — depends_on array, enforced by reducer
acceptance: swarm_task table has depends_on: Vec<String> column
task_assign reducer rejects if any dependency not completed
task_complete reducer triggers check on dependent tasks
hex task create --depends-on <id1,id2> CLI support

steps.description: Supervisor spawns worker processes at swarm init — one per role needed for the workplan
acceptance: Supervisor.run() spawns hex agent worker for each unique role
Workers registered in agent registry with swarm_id
Supervisor waits for all workers to send first heartbeat
Workers are killed when supervisor exits (process group)

steps.description: Supervisor assigns tasks to workers via SpacetimeDB reducer — not direct execution
acceptance: Supervisor calls task_assign(task_id, agent_id) reducer
Worker picks up assignment via subscription
Supervisor monitors task status changes via subscription
Supervisor advances to next tier when all tasks complete

steps.description: Agent-to-agent communication via hexflo_memory — coder writes generated_files, tester reads them
acceptance: hex-coder writes memory[step-N:generated_files] after code gen
hex-tester reads memory[step-N:generated_files] to know what to test
hex-reviewer reads same to know what to review
Memory scoped to swarm_id for isolation

steps.description: Supervisor failure recovery — detect dead agents, reassign tasks, spawn replacements
acceptance: Supervisor polls agent heartbeats every 15s
Agent stale > 45s triggers warning log
Agent dead > 120s triggers task reassignment
New worker spawned for dead agent's role
Max 3 retries before failing the task

steps.description: Worker reads AgentDefinition from YAML — model selection, context strategy, workflow phases, quality thresholds
acceptance: Worker loads hex-coder.yml (or role-specific YAML) at startup
Model selection follows YAML tier/preferred/fallback/upgrade
Context assembly uses L1/L2/L3 load strategy
Feedback loop gates from YAML (compile/lint/test)
Quality thresholds from YAML (coverage, lint warnings, file lines)

steps.description: Swarm composition from YAML — dev-pipeline.yml defines which agents, dependencies, and parallelism
acceptance: Supervisor reads hex-cli/assets/swarms/dev-pipeline.yml
Task dependencies created from YAML depends_on
Parallel agents identified from parallel_with
Conditional agents (when: has_ui_adapters) respected
per: workplan_step vs per: source_file vs per: tier honored

steps.description: Integration test: hex dev start spawns real workers that coordinate through SpacetimeDB
acceptance: hex dev start 'test feature' spawns 3+ worker processes
Workers visible in hex agent list with heartbeat status
Tasks assigned and completed via SpacetimeDB (not function calls)
Dashboard shows live agent activity
hex report latest shows per-agent timing and results
